creator: peadar@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just ran into this myself. I tracked it down to a collision between a 
symbol in libgtk2 and libgnomevfs: both export a symbol "_caches". The 
changelog from gtk indicates that it was renamed to avoid exporting it: 
that is probably just a quirk of the linker on linux. Renaming it with a 
name less likely to collide fixed the issue for me. Attached is the 
patch I'm using, post "patch" target in the port make, ie, to apply

cd ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20
make patch
patch < patch_caches.txt
make install
